message.content:
You need to replace ALL hardcoded French text in 3 dashboard sub-components with i18n translation keys. Each component needs to import useTranslation and use t.* keys.

## RULES:
- Import `useTranslation` from `../../i18n/context` (or `../i18n/context` depending on depth)
- Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the start of each component
- Replace EVERY French string with the matching `t.*` key
- Keep all existing functionality intact
- Read each file first before editing

## File 1: `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\dashboard\HeroWelcome.tsx`

Replace these hardcoded strings:
- `'Bonjour '` → `{t.dashboard.welcome}`
- `'Votre cockpit AEO est pret.'` → `{t.dashboard.cockpitReady}`
- `'Plan '` → `{t.dashboard.plan}`
- `' credits'` → ` ${t.common.credits}`
- `'Lancer un audit'` → `{t.dashboard.launchAudit}`
- `'Explorer les outils →'` → `{t.dashboard.exploreTools} →`

Import: `import { useTranslation } from '../../i18n/context';`
In the component: `const { t } = useTranslation();`

## File 2: `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\dashboard\StatsOverview.tsx`

The `cards` array has hardcoded labels. Make them dynamic using translations.

Approach: Move the `cards` array INSIDE the component so it can use `t`, OR use a function.

Replace:
- `'Score AEO'` → use `t.dashboard.aeoScore`
- `'Citations IA'` → use `t.dashboard.citations`
- `'Langues'` → use `t.dashboard.languages`
- `'Alertes'` → use `t.dashboard.alerts`
- `'Pas encore d\'audit'` → `t.analysis.noAuditYet`
- `'Lancez votre premier audit pour voir vos statistiques ici.'` → `t.dashboard.noDataYet`

Best approach: Move the `cards` const inside the component (after `const { t } = useTranslation()`) and make labels dynamic.

Import: `import { useTranslation } from '../../i18n/context';`

## File 3: `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\dashboard\QuickActions.tsx`

The `actions` array has hardcoded French text. Move it inside the component.

Replace:
- `'Nouvel audit AEO'` → `t.dashboard.newAuditAction`
- `'Analysez une URL en 30 secondes. 50 criteres × 3 moteurs IA.'` → `t.dashboard.newAuditDesc`
- `'1 credit ⚡'` → `1 ${t.dashboard.creditCost} ⚡`
- `'Lancer un audit →'` → `${t.dashboard.launch} →`
- `'Verifier mes citations'` → `t.dashboard.checkCitations`
- `'Testez si ChatGPT, Perplexity et Gemini vous recommandent.'` → `t.dashboard.checkCitationsDesc`
- `'2 credits ⚡'` → `2 ${t.dashboard.creditsCostLabel} ⚡`
- `'Verifier →'` → `${t.dashboard.check} →`
- `'Analyse multilingue'` → `t.dashboard.multilingualAction`
- `'Testez votre visibilite dans 10 langues. Trouvez les marches manques.'` → `t.dashboard.multilingualDesc`
- `'3 credits ⚡ / langue'` → `3 ${t.dashboard.creditsCostLabel} ⚡ ${t.dashboard.perLanguage}`
- `'Analyser →'` → `${t.dashboard.analyze} →`
- `'Actions rapides'` → `t.dashboard.quickActions`
- `'Commencez par une de ces actions.'` → `t.dashboard.startHere`

Import: `import { useTranslation } from '../../i18n/context';`

Execute all 3 file modifications. Read each file, then apply edits.

content.text:
All three files are correctly updated and the build passes. Here is a summary of all changes made:

---

## Summary of Changes

### File 1: `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\dashboard\HeroWelcome.tsx`

- Added `import { useTranslation } from '../../i18n/context';`
- Added `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the start of the component
- Replaced 6 hardcoded French strings:
  - `'Bonjour '` --> `{t.dashboard.welcome}`
  - `'Votre cockpit AEO est pret.'` --> `{t.dashboard.cockpitReady}`
  - `'Plan '` --> `{t.dashboard.plan}`
  - `' credits'` --> `{t.common.credits}`
  - `'Lancer un audit'` --> `{t.dashboard.launchAudit}`
  - `'Explorer les outils'` --> `{t.dashboard.exploreTools}`

### File 2: `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\dashboard\StatsOverview.tsx`

- Added `import { useTranslation } from '../../i18n/context';`
- Added `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the start of the component
- Moved the `cards` array from module scope **inside** the component body (after the `useTranslation` call) so it can reference `t.*` keys
- Used `as const` on each `key` property to preserve the literal type for `stats[card.key]` indexing
- Replaced 6 hardcoded French strings:
  - `'Score AEO'` --> `t.dashboard.aeoScore`
  - `'Citations IA'` --> `t.dashboard.citations`
  - `'Langues'` --> `t.dashboard.languages`
  - `'Alertes'` --> `t.dashboard.alerts`
  - `"Pas encore d'audit"` --> `t.analysis.noAuditYet`
  - `'Lancez votre premier audit...'` --> `t.dashboard.noDataYet`

### File 3: `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\dashboard\QuickActions.tsx`

- Added `import { useTranslation } from '../../i18n/context';`
- Added `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the start of the component
- Moved the `actions` array from module scope **inside** the component body so it can reference `t.*` keys
- Replaced 14 hardcoded French strings:
  - `'Nouvel audit AEO'` --> `t.dashboard.newAuditAction`
  - `'Analysez une URL en 30 secondes...'` --> `t.dashboard.newAuditDesc`
  - `'1 credit'` --> `` `1 ${t.dashboard.creditCost}` ``
  - `'Lancer un audit'` --> `` `${t.dashboard.launch}` ``
  - `'Verifier mes citations'` --> `t.dashboard.checkCitations`
  - `'Testez si ChatGPT...'` --> `t.dashboard.checkCitationsDesc`
  - `'2 credits'` --> `` `2 ${t.dashboard.creditsCostLabel}` ``
  - `'Verifier'` --> `` `${t.dashboard.check}` ``
  - `'Analyse multilingue'` --> `t.dashboard.multilingualAction`
  - `'Testez votre visibilite...'` --> `t.dashboard.multilingualDesc`
  - `'3 credits / langue'` --> `` `3 ${t.dashboard.creditsCostLabel} ... ${t.dashboard.perLanguage}` ``
  - `'Analyser'` --> `` `${t.dashboard.analyze}` ``
  - `'Actions rapides'` --> `t.dashboard.quickActions`
  - `'Commencez par une de ces actions.'` --> `t.dashboard.startHere`

All translation keys already existed in the `i18n/locales/fr.ts` dictionary under `dashboard.*`, `common.*`, and `analysis.*` sections. The production build completes successfully with zero errors.
